description_long: This is a flat-bottomed airboat with a green hull and metallic interior, designed for shallow water navigation. The vessel features a large, protective metal cage at the rear, housing a powerful propeller and engine assembly, which is elevated above the deck. The seating area consists of two tan seats mounted centrally, with a steering console and control levers positioned in front of the driver. The deck is open and spacious, with visible metal flooring and side gunwales for structural support. Carrying handles are present at the bow and stern, and the hull displays some text markings near the front. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal framework, mesh, and painted surfaces.
description: A green, flat-bottomed airboat with a metal cage-protected propeller, tan seats, and a spacious open deck. The vessel features carrying handles, side gunwales, and visible registration markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open bow, green hull, and the two tan seats behind the steering console.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the hull, the elevated propeller cage, and the seating arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large propeller, protective cage, and the symmetrical layout of the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the engine, propeller cage, and the open deck area.
